overview.value: Rubber Plant has broad glossy leaves and a strong upright shape. It becomes a bold indoor tree when given bright filtered light and consistent watering.

careDifficultyDescription.value: Generally sturdy, but leaf drop can happen after sudden changes.

light.value: Bright indirect light; some gentle morning sun is helpful.

water.value: Water when the top 3-5 cm of soil dries.

humidityDescription.value: Average humidity works, but moderate humidity keeps leaves cleaner and softer.

diseaseRiskDescription.value: Watch for leaf drop from overwatering, drafts, or abrupt relocation.

tips.value: Dust the large leaves often and rotate the pot for even growth.
